## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Page**: [e.g. /workspace, /batch, /result]
- **File type**: [e.g. PDF, PNG, JPG]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 126]
- **Invoice type**: [e.g. GST invoice, foreign USD, handwritten receipt]

## Screenshots / Error Output
If applicable, add screenshots or paste the error JSON.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
